water.name: Feather River, North Fork, from Belden Bridge downstream to Cresta Powerhouse

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(b)(48) — Feather River North Fork from Belden Bridge downstream to Cresta Powerhouse (Butte and Plumas Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (48) Feather River North Fork from Belden Bridge downstream to Cresta Powerhouse (excluding reservoirs) (Butte and Plumas Cos.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

groups.humanSummary: North Fork Feather River from Belden Bridge downstream to Cresta Powerhouse, excluding reservoirs (Butte and Plumas Cos.): open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February, artificial lures with barbless hooks only, 0-trout (catch-and-release).
groups.verbatimText: (48) Feather River North Fork from Belden Bridge downstream to Cresta Powerhouse (excluding reservoirs) (Butte and Plumas Cos.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

parameters.description: This segment excludes any reservoirs located within the Belden Bridge to Cresta Powerhouse reach (e.g. Rock Creek and Cresta reservoirs); reservoirs are not subject to this river regulation.

regulations.humanSummary: Reservoirs within this reach are excluded from the river's special regulation.
Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February, catch-and-release only.
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained; all trout caught must be released unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero-trout bag limit (catch and release only), Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
